ns0:entry.ns0:title: David-Crty/databasement
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/David-Crty/databasement
Language: php
Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
Language: php
🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
Language: php
Open-source event management and ticket selling platform — perfect for concerts, conferences, and everything in between 🎟️ If you find this project helpful, please consider giving us a star ⭐️

ns0:entry.ns0:title: algolia/api-clients-automation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/algolia/api-clients-automation
Language: php
🤖 Monorepo of the Algolia API specs and their auto-generated clients and documentation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bcit-ci/CodeIgniter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bcit-ci/CodeIgniter
Language: php
Open Source PHP Framework (originally from EllisLab)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elementor/elementor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementor/elementor
Language: php
The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freescout-help-desk/freescout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freescout-help-desk/freescout
Language: php
FreeScout — Free self-hosted help desk & shared mailbox (Zendesk / Help Scout alternative)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/invoiceninja/invoiceninja
Language: php
A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/boost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/boost
Language: php
Laravel-focused MCP server for augmenting your AI powered local development experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk
Language: php
The official PHP SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with The PHP Foundation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/server
Language: php
☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openmediavault/openmediavault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openmediavault/openmediavault
Language: php
openmediavault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. Thanks to the modular design of the framework it can be enhanced via plugins. openmediavault is primarily designed to be used in home environments or small home offices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shopware/shopware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shopware/shopware
Language: php
Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 3.100 community extensions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: woocommerce/woocommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/woocommerce/woocommerce
Language: php
A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.
